transcript: Hi everyone. Always good to see you, and this is long overdue. So, just to talk you through the full new Real Vision experience, just so you're aware of what's here. Firstly, there's a new fantastic thing called The Pulse. The Pulse is an AI-generated report that comes out three or four times a day and gives you an update of what's happening. You can dig into any of these and see what's going on, view them, see what the community's been thinking about, looking at. So, here comes micron. We've had a couple of trade wrecks back here. Um you can find all about it. You can learn about it. You can hit anyone on the platform explain, and the Real Vision brain will explain it to you. So, it gives you the ability to dig deeper. This also tells you what's trending on Real Vision, so you can quickly catch up. But, this is the start of The Pulse. Over the next few weeks, you'll see much more intelligence compression of everything going on the network. What are people talking about? What's moving that with the trade ideas? Who's got the best trade ideas right now? Where are the research notes that are really adding value? What is the sentiment of the community? You can find any piece of content. You can find anything you want in the brain. The brain is invaluable in your journey. But, the conversations are always there on the brain. You can just go and look at previous conversations, continue with conversations, all of that. Super useful. The other thing that most people aren't aware of here is we're rolling out Real Vision Mentors and I'm the first one.
